User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the IHN TopUp application.

uniqueId.description: A short, numeric, user-facing unique ID for transfers.

savedGameUids.description: Array of saved game UIDs for the user.

referralCode.description: Unique referral code for the user.

isVerified.description: Indicates if the user's account is verified.

isAdmin.description: Indicates if the user has admin privileges.

points.description: Points earned by the user through referrals or other activities.

fcmToken.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications.

TopUpCard.title: TopUpCard
TopUpCard.description: Represents a top-up card for a specific game or service.

id.description: Unique identifier for the top-up card.

name.description: Name of the top-up card (e.g., Free Fire Diamonds).

description.description: Detailed description of the top-up card.

price.description: Base price of the top-up card if there are no options.

serviceType.description: Type of service, e.g., Game or Others.

gameUidFormat.description: Format or validation rules for the Game UID

isActive.description: Controls visibility of the card on the user-facing site.

sortOrder.description: The order in which the card should be displayed.

inStock.description: Indicates if the package option is in stock.

stockLimit.description: Optional: Maximum number of times this option can be sold.

stockSoldCount.description: How many times this option has been sold.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a category of top-up cards (e.g., Discount Offers, Regular TopUp).

imageUrl.description: URL of the image for the category.

sortOrder.description: The order in which the category should be displayed.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents an order placed by a user.

userName.description: Name of the user at the time of order.

productName.description: Name of the product at time of order.

productOption.description: Selected option of the product at time of order.

quantity.description: Quantity of the top-up card ordered.

gameUid.description: Game UID provided by the user for the order.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for the order.

originalAmount.description: The original total amount of the order before discounts.

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order after applying discounts.

orderDate.description: Date and time when the order was placed.

isLimitedStock.description: True if the order was for a stock-limited item.

cancellationReason.description: Reason for order cancellation or refund, if applicable.

name.description: Public name of the coupon (e.g., 'New User Discount').

type.description: Type of discount (e.g., Percentage, Fixed Amount).

minPurchaseAmount.description: Minimum purchase amount required to use the coupon. Optional.

expiryDate.description: Date when the coupon expires. Optional.

usageLimitPerUser.description: Maximum number of times a single user can use this coupon. Optional.

totalUsageLimit.description: Maximum number of times this coupon can be used in total. Optional.

categoryIds.description: IDs of categories where the coupon is applicable.

isActive.description: Whether the coupon is currently active.

isStoreVisible.description: Whether the coupon is visible in the user-facing coupon store.

claimLimit.description: How many users can claim this coupon from the store.

claimedCount.description: How many users have already claimed this coupon from the store.

UserCoupon.title: UserCoupon
UserCoupon.description: Represents a coupon owned by a user. This schema defines the structure of a coupon document within a user's `coupons` subcollection. Security rules will ensure that only the owner can read or write their own coupons, including listing them.

description.description: A description of the coupon and its benefits.

acquiredDate.description: Date the user acquired the coupon.

ReferralSettings.title: ReferralSettings
ReferralSettings.description: Stores the settings for the referral system. This should be a single document.

signupBonus.description: Points a new user gets for signing up with a referral code.

referrerBonus.description: Points a referrer gets when their referred user signs up.

firstOrderBonus.description: Bonus points for the referrer when their referred user completes their first order.

purchaseBonusTiers.description: Tiers for rewarding users based on their total spending.

type.description: Type of transaction (e.g., Deposit, Deduction, Refund).

WalletTopUpRequest.title: WalletTopUpRequest
WalletTopUpRequest.description: Represents a user's request to add funds to their wallet.

rejectionReason.description: Reason for rejecting the top-up request.

linkUrl.description: Optional URL the notice links to.

PaymentMethod.title: PaymentMethod
PaymentMethod.description: Represents a payment method available for wallet top-up.

BalanceTransfer.title: BalanceTransfer
BalanceTransfer.description: Represents a balance transfer between two users.

amountSent.description: The amount debited from the sender's wallet.

amountReceived.description: The amount credited to the recipient's wallet.

PaymentSettings.title: PaymentSettings
PaymentSettings.description: Singleton document storing payment settings for the app.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their own profile data.

/users/{userId}/transactions/{transactio.description: Stores transaction history for a specific user. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their transaction details.

/users/{userId}/coupons/{userCouponId}.description: Stores coupons owned by a specific user. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their own coupons, including listing them.

/orders/{orderId}.description: Stores all orders placed by users. Users can only access their own orders, while admins can access all.

/categories/{categoryId}.description: Stores categories of top-up cards. Publicly readable.

/top_up_cards/{topUpCardId}.description: Stores top-up card information. Publicly readable.

/coupons/{couponId}.description: Stores coupon information. Publicly readable by users, but only writable by admins.

/referrals/{referralId}.description: Stores referral information. Admins can read all, users can read referrals where they are the referrer.

/settings/referral.description: Singleton document storing referral system settings. Only readable/writable by admins.

/banners/{bannerId}.description: Stores banner information for promotional purposes.

/wallet_top_up_requests/{requestId}.description: Stores user requests to top-up their wallets. Admins can read all requests and update their status. Users can read their own requests.

/payment_methods/{methodId}.description: Stores available payment methods. Publicly readable.

/balance_transfers/{transferId}.description: Stores all balance transfer records between users.
